title: Colonel Effingham's Raid
writer: Kathryn Scola, Berry Fleming, Frank Gabrielson
actors: Charles Coburn, Joan Bennett, William Eythe
plot: In 1940, Colonel Will Seaborn Effingham (Charles Coburn), a retired Army officer, returns to his home town of Fredericksville, Georgia, and is disturbed at the lack of civic pride. He writes a letter to the editor in the local new...
